about.title: About
about.subtitle: An AI-powered resume analysis and job recommendation system designed to help students, fresh graduates, and job seekers land their dream careers.
about.projectDesc1: SRAI (Saraswati Resume AI) is a comprehensive web application that leverages artificial intelligence to analyze resumes, identify skill gaps, and provide personalized job recommendations.
about.projectDesc2: The platform is designed with a focus on helping students and fresh graduates navigate the competitive job market by providing actionable insights to improve their resumes and increase their chances of landing interviews.
about.projectDesc3: This project was developed as part of the BCA Final Year curriculum, demonstrating the practical application of modern web technologies and AI/ML concepts.

features.parsingDesc: Automatically extracts name, email, skills, education, and experience from uploaded resumes.
features.analysisDesc: Generates resume strength score (0-100), skill gap analysis, and improvement suggestions.
features.atsDesc: Provides keyword optimization tips to make your resume ATS-friendly.
features.jobsDesc: Matches your profile with relevant job listings based on skills and experience.
features.adminDesc: Comprehensive dashboard for managing job listings and viewing analytics.
features.responsiveDesc: Fully responsive interface that works seamlessly on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

academic.title: SARASWATI
academic.description: This project demonstrates the practical application of web development, database management, and artificial intelligence concepts learned during the Bachelor of Computer Applications program.

about.featuresSubtitle: Powerful features designed to give you the competitive edge in your job search
about.techSubtitle: Built with cutting-edge technologies for the best performance

tips.title: Interview Tips
tips.tip1: Use the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result) for behavioral questions.
tips.tip2: Speak clearly and at a steady pace — quality over quantity.
tips.tip3: Back up claims with specific, measurable examples from your experience.
tips.tip4: Take a brief moment to think before answering complex questions.
tips.tip5: Stay positive and authentic — interviewers value honest reflection.
